Commandos, the carnage continues !

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales - PS5 Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/the-adventures-of-elliot-the-millennium-tales/

The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales is out now! A brand-new action RPG from the creators of OCTOPATH TRAVELER and BRAVELY DEFAULT, The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales combines stunning HD-2D visuals and exciting action-adventure gameplay for the first time.

Enjoy intuitive and rewarding action-based battles with strategic support abilities from a fairy as you reveal this world’s mysterious history!

The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales is out now on PlayStation 5.

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Asphalt Legends - Sonic 35th Anniversary Event | PS5 Games
The Blue Blur returns in time to celebrate Sonic's 35th Anniversary! Join Asphalt Legends in the celebration as Sonic is joined by enemies and frenemies alike, with Tails, Knuckles, Amy, Shadow, Dr. Eggman and even the Chao join the race!

#ps5 #ps5games #asphaltlegends

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Where Winds Meet - 1.8 Version "Companions Make Home" Trailer | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/where-winds-meet/

New Version "Companions Make Home" arrives June 25! Find your cozy corner in the Jianghu with the heartwarming Homestead and Companion features. Watch your cats grow fat and your home thrive, farm like a true martial master, and meet Companions who'll journey by your side. The Jianghu doesn't have to be lonely.

#ps5 #ps5games #wherewindsmeet

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
The Grinch 2: Saving Christmas - Announce Trailer | PS5 & PS4 Games
Too early for Christmas? 
Good. 

The Grinch is back. 

From his cave on Mt.Crumpit to Who-ville, join him and Max on a mischievous co-op adventure to gather ornaments, overcome challenges, and decorate the ultimate Christmas tree. 

Coming soon to PlayStation!

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Street Fighter 6 - Yasmine Gameplay Trailer | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/street-fighter-6/

Hailing from the Philippines, Yasmine will rush you down with her skills in Eskrima on August 3!

Pay close attention to her movement lest you be on the wrong side of her karambit.

Yasmine can be purchased individually with Fighter Coins and the owners of the Year 4 Character Pass / Ultimate Pass will automatically get access to her when she releases.

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games #StreetFighter6 #SF6 #Yasmine #Capcom
